name: Abomasite
desc: One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Abomasnow hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.

name: Absolite
desc: One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Absol hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.

name: Absorb Bulb

name: Adamant Orb

name: Adrenaline Orb
desc: If held by a Pokémon, it boosts Speed when intimidated.

name: Aerodactylite
desc: One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Aerodactyl hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.

name: Aguav Berry
desc: If held by a Pokémon, it restores the user’s HP in a pinch, but it will cause confusion if the user hates the taste.

name: Air Balloon
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. The holder will float in the air until hit. Once the holder is hit, this item will burst.

name: Alakazite
desc: One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Alakazam hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.

desc: This is a crystallized form of Z-Power. It upgrades Alolan Raichu’s Thunderbolt to a Z-Move.

desc: One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Altaria hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.

desc: A Berry to be consumed by Pokémon. If a Pokémon holds one, it can recover from being frozen on its own in battle.

name: Assault Vest
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This offensive vest raises Sp. Def but prevents the use of status moves.

name: Audinite
desc: One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Audino hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.

name: Beedrillite
desc: One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Beedrill hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.

name: Big Root
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts the amount of HP the holder restores from HP-stealing moves.

name: Binding Band

name: Black Belt
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This belt helps the wearer to focus and boosts the power of Fighting-type moves.

name: Black Glasses
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a pair of shady-looking glasses that boost the power of Dark-type moves.

name: Blastoisinite
desc: One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Blastoise hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.

name: Blazikenite
desc: One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Blaziken hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.

name: Blunder Policy
desc: Raises Speed sharply when a Pokémon misses with a move because of accuracy.

name: Bright Powder
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It casts a tricky glare that lowers the opposing Pokémon’s accuracy.

name: Bug Memory

name: Buginium Z
desc: This is a crystallized form of Z-Power. It upgrades Bug-type moves to Z-Moves.

name: Burn Drive

desc: One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Camerupt hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.

name: Rockium Z
desc: This is a crystallized form of Z-Power. It upgrades Rock-type moves to Z-Moves.

name: Rocky Helmet
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the holder is hit, the attacker will also be damaged upon contact.

name: Room Service
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. Lowers Speed when Trick Room takes effect.

name: Rose Incense
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This exotic-smelling incense boosts the power of Grass-type moves.

name: Roseli Berry
desc: If held by a Pokémon, this Berry will lessen the damage taken from one supereffective Fairy-type attack.

name: Rusted Shield
desc: It is said that a hero used this shield to halt a terrible disaster in ancient times. But it’s grown rusty and worn.

name: Rusted Sword
desc: It is said that a hero used this sword to halt a terrible disaster in ancient times. But it’s grown rusty and worn.

name: Sablenite
desc: One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Sableye hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.

name: Safety Goggles
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. These goggles protect the holder from both weather-related damage and powder.

name: Salac Berry
desc: A Berry to be consumed by Pokémon. If a Pokémon holds one, its Speed stat will increase when it’s in a pinch.

name: Salamencite
desc: One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Salamence hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.

name: Sceptilite
desc: One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Sceptile hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.

name: Scizorite
desc: One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Scizor hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.

name: Scope Lens
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a lens for scoping out weak points. It boosts the holder’s critical-hit ratio.

name: Sea Incense
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This incense has a curious aroma that boosts the power of Water-type moves.

name: Sharp Beak
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a long, sharp beak that boosts the power of Flying-type moves.

name: Sharpedonite
desc: One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Sharpedo hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.

name: Shed Shell
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This discarded carapace enables the holder to switch out of battle without fail.

name: Shell Bell
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. The holder restores a little HP every time it inflicts damage on others.

name: Shock Drive
desc: A cassette to be held by Genesect. It changes Genesect’s Techno Blast move so it becomes Electric type.

name: Shuca Berry
desc: If held by a Pokémon, this Berry will lessen the damage taken from one supereffective Ground-type attack.

name: Silk Scarf
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a sumptuous scarf that boosts the power of Normal-type moves.

name: Silver Powder
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a shiny silver powder that will boost the power of Bug-type moves.

name: Sitrus Berry
desc: A Berry to be consumed by Pokémon. If a Pokémon holds one, it can restore its own HP by a small amount during battle.

name: Sky Plate
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a stone tablet that boosts the power of Flying-type moves.

name: Slowbronite
desc: One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Slowbro hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.

name: Smoke Ball
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It enables the holder to flee from any wild Pokémon encounter without fail.

name: Smooth Rock
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It extends the duration of the move Sandstorm when used by the holder.

name: Snorlium Z
desc: This is a crystallized form of Z-Power. It upgrades Snorlax’s Giga Impact to a Z-Move.

name: Snowball
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts Attack if the holder is hit with an Ice-type attack. It can only be used once.

name: Soft Sand
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a loose, silky sand that boosts the power of Ground-type moves.

name: Soul Dew
desc: A wondrous orb to be held by either Latios or Latias. It raises the power of Psychic- and Dragon-type moves.

name: Spell Tag
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a sinister, eerie tag that boosts the power of Ghost-type moves.

name: Splash Plate
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a stone tablet that boosts the power of Water-type moves.

name: Spooky Plate
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a stone tablet that boosts the power of Ghost-type moves.

name: Starf Berry
desc: A Berry to be consumed by Pokémon. If a Pokémon holds one, one of its stats will sharply increase when it’s in a pinch.

name: Steel Gem
desc: A gem with an essence of steel. When held, it strengthens the power of a Steel-type move one time.

name: Steel Memory
desc: A memory disc that contains Steel-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokémon.

name: Steelium Z
desc: This is a crystallized form of Z-Power. It upgrades Steel-type moves to Z-Moves.

name: Steelixite
desc: One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Steelix hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.

name: Sticky Barb
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It damages the holder every turn and may latch on to Pokémon that touch the holder.

name: Stone Plate
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a stone tablet that boosts the power of Rock-type moves.

name: Swampertite
desc: One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Swampert hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.

name: Tanga Berry
desc: If held by a Pokémon, this Berry will lessen the damage taken from one supereffective Bug-type attack.

name: Tapunium Z
desc: This is a crystallized form of Z-Power. It upgrades the tapu’s Nature’s Madness to a Z-Move.

name: Terrain Extender
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It extends the duration of the terrain caused by the holder’s move or Ability.

name: Thick Club
desc: An item to be held by Cubone or Marowak. It’s a hard bone of some sort that boosts the Attack stat.

name: Throat Spray
desc: Raises Sp. Atk when a Pokémon uses a sound-based move.

name: Toxic Orb
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a bizarre orb that will badly poison the holder during battle.

name: Toxic Plate
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a stone tablet that boosts the power of Poison-type moves.

name: Twisted Spoon
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This spoon is imbued with telekinetic power and boosts Psychic-type moves.

name: Tyranitarite
desc: One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Tyranitar hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.

name: Utility Umbrella
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This sturdy umbrella protects the holder from the effects of rain and harsh sunlight.

name: Venusaurite
desc: One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Venusaur hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.

name: Wacan Berry
desc: If held by a Pokémon, this Berry will lessen the damage taken from one supereffective Electric-type attack.

name: Water Gem
desc: A gem with an essence of water. When held, it strengthens the power of a Water-type move one time.

name: Water Memory
desc: A memory disc that contains Water-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokémon.

name: Waterium Z
desc: This is a crystallized form of Z-Power. It upgrades Water-type moves to Z-Moves.

name: Wave Incense
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This incense has a curious aroma that boosts the power of Water-type moves.

name: Weakness Policy
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. Attack and Sp. Atk sharply increase if the holder is hit with a move it’s weak to.

name: White Herb
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It will restore any lowered stat in battle. It can be used only once.

name: Wide Lens
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a magnifying lens that slightly boosts the accuracy of moves.

name: Wiki Berry
desc: If held by a Pokémon, it restores the user’s HP in a pinch, but it will cause confusion if the user hates the taste.

name: Wise Glasses
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This thick pair of glasses slightly boosts the power of special moves.

name: Yache Berry
desc: If held by a Pokémon, this Berry will lessen the damage taken from one supereffective Ice-type attack.

name: Yellow Nectar
desc: A flower nectar obtained at Melemele Meadow. It changes the form of certain species of Pokémon.

name: Zap Plate
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a stone tablet that boosts the power of Electric-type moves.

name: Zoom Lens
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the holder moves after its target moves, its accuracy will be boosted.
